entry.title: CCM: How add field to table VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1
entry.content:
Hi,

We need the field VSBED to be added to business volume table VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1 because we get an error when running tx WB2R_BUSVOL. The field has already been added to structure WB2_S_BVB_FIELDCAT. Please advise how to get field VSBED in the business volume table.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to connect to RISE using saprouter over Azure?
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, Site-to-Site IPSEC VPN between on-premise and RISE Azure is supported. The customer should be able to connect in a similar manner as they do now. Please see below blogs which details all connectivity options between on-premises and RISE hyper scalars.

RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition : Sec... - SAP Community

Network connectivity options in Azure with SAP RISE | Microsoft Learn

Regards, Kishan

entry.title: Re: Custom fields and Custom logic in settlement management
entry.content: Hi, please elaborate on the solution for this issue

entry.title: Re: CCM: How add field to table VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1
entry.content:
Hi @jb123, 

VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1 is a standard CDS view, I would not recommend to enhance it. 
You can create your own CDS view and add the logic for VBAK-VSBED field if you want to use this field for business volume selection criteria. 
 
If you need this field for pricing calculation, adding it to the CDS view will not be enough and further development will be required.  
  
Regards,
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: CCM: How add field to table VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1
entry.content: OK, thanks. VSBED is used in a condition table / access sequence for a contract type to calculate accruals.

entry.title: Threshold for data store in Cloud Integration
entry.content: Our integration package published in API Hub contains integration flows that uses data store. For instance in one of the data stores we are saving the absence records in order to determine based on the unique external ID if a particular absence record has been updated in SuccessFactors Employee Central. As we are dealing with customers having huge population the demand to keep all the absence records in anticipation of any updates to them raises a potential concern with the data store collapsing or failing due to large amount of data. Though we have a tool to perform clean up of the data store we would like to know the limit of the data store like threshold in terms of file size so that we can make a decision in terms of how to manage it. Also, any advise to deal with our case is much appreciated as we need to at least keep all the absence records in the data store for at least a year.

entry.title: Re: change "valid to" field in Profit Center master collectively
entry.content: Hello, sorry for ask, how to make LSMW for mass change valid to profit and cost center?

entry.title: Re: New asset accounting activation in S4/HANA
entry.content: Yes. Entry was missing in table TFAAD_BSN_FUNC. I ran transaction FAA_DOACTIVATION to change activation option to “Active”. gave client number, and executed. Table was updated and New Asset Accounting was activated.

entry.title: How to upload PR items through excel to My purchase requisitions app in S/4 public cloud?
entry.content:
I want to create PR and mass upload PR items to "My purchase requisitions" or "Manage purchase requisitions" app by using excel and postman app. 

After creating the PR, it will go for approvals as per the PR workflow. After it is fully approved, it should auto convert to PO, auto GR/IR and directly go to the payment with no manual intervention.

Point to note: We are not using material in PR but the short text to enter line items. Therefore, there won't be any product master data or purchasing info. record changes possible to automate PR to PO.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: Report for incoterms and sales order
entry.content:
Hi All i want to run a report which will show incoterm and customer name.

how to convert delivery note in spreadsheet.

entry.title: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – How and Why to Upgrade SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA 2023 or Higher
entry.content:
Did you know?

There has been a significant change in the options for updating your SAP Fiori front-end server version for your SAP S/4HANA system starting from SAP S/4HANA 2023.

There is a strict dependency enforced between your SAP S/4HANA release and your SAP Fiori version.  This means:

  • You can only upgrade SAP Fiori by upgrading SAP Fiori as part of a full-stack upgrade of your SAP S/4HANA release.

Of course:

  • You can still patch SAP Fiori within your current SAP S/4HANA release.

Worth Knowing: SAP Fiori is technically implemented via the SAPUI5 framework. SAPUI5 Major / minor version is explained in the SAPUI5 SDK section Versioning and Maintenance of SAPUI5.  SAPUI5 uses a three-number version identifier, for example, 1.120.15. The numbers have the following meaning:

  • The first part (1) specifies the release number (major version).
  • The second part (120) specifies the version number (minor version).
  • The third part (15) specifies the patch number.

Options for upgrading SAP Fiori from SAP S/4HANA 2023

From SAP S/4HANA release 2023, you can only update your SAP Fiori – i.e. the SAPUI5 major and/or minor version - as part of a SAP S/4HANA upgrade.

For example:

  • Upgrade from an earlier SAP S/4HANA release to the SAP S/4HANA 2023 release or higher - such as a full stack upgrade from SAP S/4HANA 2021 FPS01 to SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02
  • Upgrade to a higher FPS of the SAP S/4HANA 2023 release - such as a full stack upgrade from SAP S/4HANA Initial Shipment Stack to SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02
  • Upgrade from SAP S/4HANA 2023 to a higher SAP S/4HANA release - such as a full stack upgrade from SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 to SAP S/4HANA 2025 FPS01

 

 

A full stack upgrade is the recommended approach for SAP S/4HANA 2023 and all higher releases.

Within your current SAP S/4HANA release, you can – and should! – update SAP Fiori by applying patches. This means you can still update your SAPUI5 patch number.

The advantage of patching is you will:

  • Gain minor feature improvements possible in your current SAP S/4HANA release
  • Apply fixes for known and already resolved issues

 

Good times to patch SAP Fiori are:

  • Immediately on install of your new SAP S/4HANA release
  • Immediately after upgrade to a new SAP S/4HANA release
  • For long-running projects, to minimize rediscovering known & already resolved issues, it can make sense to patch up before User Acceptance Testing.
  • When needed to resolve a critical incident. For example, when advised by SAP Support to apply a patch as part of resolution of a SAP Incident.

For the strategy refer to the section Upgrade Options in

SAP Fiori deployment options and SAP Fiori front-end server strategy - UPDATE 2023 and the linked document SAP Fiori deployment options and system landscape recommendations

For the detailed information on how to update, refer to the central note:

SAP Note 2217489 - Maintenance and Update Strategy for SAP Fiori Front-End Server

You should also check the fine detail in the SAP Fiori front-end server release information note for your SAP S/4HANA release. For example, for SAP S/4HANA 2023, you should refer to:

SAP Note 3340880 - SAP Fiori front-end server 2023 for SAP S/4HANA

 

How is this different from SAP S/4HANA 2022 and earlier releases

 

In SAP S/4HANA 2022 there were 2 additional options for a delta upgrade of SAP Fiori that made it possible to run a higher SAP Fiori version against a lower SAP S/4HANA release.

You had delta upgrade options such as:

  • Platform Upgrade
    • You could upgrade your SAP Fiori front-end server. For example, you could upgrade to SAP Fiori FES 2022 with release SAP S/4HANA 1909.
  • FES Only Upgrade
    • You could technically upgrade only the SAP Fiori UI components for FES. For example, you could upgrade your SAP Fiori version from 1.71 to 1.108 with release SAP S/4HANA 1909.

These options were described in How and why to upgrade SAP Fiori for your SAP S/4HANA solution.

While some customers did manage to make these changes, in practice they complicated support, required considerable regression testing, caused undesirable side-effects, and complicated upgrades. For example, side-effect issues with some apps – such as My Inbox and Custom CDS Views – in the software component UIBAS001 as described in SAP Note 2436567 - UI for Basis Applications - General Information

From SAP S/4HANA 2023 these delta upgrade options are no longer supported.

Summary of upgrade options from SAP S/4HANA 2023 compared to earlier SAP S/4HANA releases:

 

 

Becoming a SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA guru

You’ll find much more on our  SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA topic page

Other helpful links:

  • See all questions and answers about SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA 
  • Follow SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA for more blogs and updates 
  • Ask a Question about SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA

Brought to you by the SAP S/4HANA RIG and Customer Care team.

entry.title: Re: Import Goods Movement Goods Issue from excel

They don't want to input data one by one because of the data to input is too many. So we can use the API for this case ? Thankyou!

entry.title: Re: Best Practices for SAP Analytics Cloud CSV and Excel export performance
entry.content:
Hi Rui,

I am not aware of a way to export a table (from SAC story) into several csv files, with a fixed number of rows in each file.

Please feel free to submit an improvement request through SAP Analytics Cloud Continuous Influence site here.

Thank you,
Radim

entry.title: How to block Sales Order and Delivery when the previous AR Invoice Transaction is not yet paid
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Im writing and developing a code for my Transaction Notification yet i cant figure it out anyone can help me, this is the details :

I want to Block the Sales Order and Delivery with the following condition
1. If there are previous AR Invoice(Last Transaction) are not paid
2. If the last Delivery of the customer is not yet copied or encoded to AR Invoice.
3. if Due date + 10 Days has past from the due of the invoice

entry.title: Re: Import Goods Movement Goods Issue from excel
entry.content:
HI @Arielgwyn , They can also consider the apps like Confirm Production Operation which allows them to do scanning of barcodes.

As it is production order related (or process order, there is an API for that too), they can also consider the API Production Order Confirmation https://api.sap.com/api/API_PROD_ORDER_CONFIRMATION_2_SRV/overview

Where they can also log the time ticket, goods movement, etc.

I hope this helps.

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: DELETE_ENTITY calling GET_ENTITYSET in MDK?
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, MDK currently will perform a GET before calling DELETE. So, it's required that your Entity Set has GET implemented.

BR

entry.title: Migration of SD - Condition Records for Free Goods
entry.content:
Hi Members, 

I am migrating the condition records for free goods using the SD - Condition Records for Free Goods Migration Object in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition. During the migration, I need to input the condition table number for the condition type YA00 - Free Goods SD. However, I couldn't find the condition table number for the mentioned condition type in the system.

Then, when I simulate the migration project, it says, "For condition type YA00 and table 004, there are no valid access sequences."

I'm trying to find the KB but couldn't find any. Please help me with where I can check the condition table number and access sequence for the condition type YA00 - Free Goods SD.

Thanks.

Kenny

entry.title: Re: SAP ByD: Is it possible to do budget reporting withou...
entry.content:
Hi Rami.

We upload our budgets through the work center 'Cost and Revenue' and then select the planning option. You can export a blank excel template and upload your budgets with a year and a name, and if you wish, multiple different versions.  

There a number of financial reports that then enable you to run an Actual vs Budget report and you can tell it what budget version you wish to use.

I dont know if we have active budget turned on, I dont even know what that is, but from your description, i cant imagine we do.

Regards

David

entry.title: Re: Use TypeScript with the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model
entry.content: Thanks @KevinR for sharing your experience.  I'm glad you are getting into TypeScript!  Readers might also like to check out a blog series I wrote last year, Why the TypeScript Sheriff has come to clean up your JavaScript

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Invalid request received by HTTP proxy: An HTT...
entry.content:
Hi Kishan. Thank you for your input. yes I already read it. This SAP Note is relevant  for HTTP Receiver Adapter and not for OData Receiver Adapter.

and exception is also littel different than this note exception : Invalid request received by HTTP proxy: An HTTP line is larger than 8192 bytes

The actual issue is, upto some level only  I could able to use the entities to retrieve info from API, if I added addtional entities, I get this error.
If the issue is limitations of size, then where to and how to extend size ?

 

 

Thank you 

Sateesh

entry.title: Configuring SF EC to ERP Mapping Without Location Group using BIB
entry.content:
Understanding the Challenge

Traditionally, we use standard Business Integration Builder (BIB) tool for configuring employee replication where ERP's Personnel Area is linked to SF EC's Location Group, and ERP's Personnel Subarea is linked to SF EC's Location. However, many customers nowadays opt not to create a Location Group field in SF EC. This omission complicates ERP configuration since Personnel Area remains a mandatory field.

Implementing the Solution

To overcome this challenge effectively, we may think implementing a Business Add-In (BADI) becomes essential. This BADI allows us to update ERP's Personnel Area when there's no direct mapping from SF EC's Location Group and Personnel Subarea fields.

Due to the need for additional development work, the overall implementation timeline may increase. This is primarily because the BADI implementation involves designing and testing custom logic to handle data mappings effectively.

But we can handle this in the standard configuration without BADI using a generic conversion rule.

  1. Identify the Requirement: Recognize the need to establish a mapping solution between SF EC's Location and ERP's Personnel Area/Subarea due to the absence of a Location Group field in SF EC.
  2. Configure BIB: Adjust the existing BIB configuration to accommodate the new mapping logic. Since there's no Location Group in SF EC, reconfigure the mapping to directly link SF EC's Location to ERP's Personnel Subarea.

Practical Example: Mapping Personnel Area and Subarea

Let's illustrate this with a practical example scenario:

  • Scenario: SF EC does not have a Location Group field.
  • Objective: Ensure ERP's Personnel Area and Subarea fields are correctly populated based on SF EC's Location field.

Personnel Subarea Mapping:

In this case, SF EC locations are defined as 1001, 1002, 1011, and 1012. Since the values of Personnel Subarea and Location are identical, no additional value mapping updates are necessary initially. However, if there are changes in either system's values, updating the mapping becomes crucial.

Personnel Area Mapping:

To map ERP's Personnel Area (WERKS), identify a field that isn't currently used for mapping purposes in SF EC and map that field to WERKS in ERP.

  • Utilize a generic value conversion rule (e.g., Replace with String/EC Field) to pass SF EC's Location field values to ERP's Personnel Area field (e.g., corporation field).

  • Example: If SF EC's Location field is 1001, it maps directly to ERP's corresponding field WERKS as 1001.

Updating Value Mapping:

It's imperative to update the value mapping for the Personnel Area field. Establish a mapping where SF EC's Location field values serve as the EC key, linking them to the corresponding Personnel Area values in ERP based on your enterprise structure configuration.

Please find the results of our configuration in verbose log.

Conclusion

In conclusion, adapting to the absence of a Location Group field in SF EC requires a strategic approach. By adjusting the BIB configuration, you ensure seamless integration between SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central and ERP systems. This setup not only resolves integration challenges but also enhances flexibility in managing system configurations based on evolving customer needs.

By following these steps and examples, you can effectively configure SF EC to ERP mappings even in scenarios where traditional field mappings might not be available, ensuring smooth and reliable data synchronization across your enterprise systems.

entry.title: Re: Replication of Quotations from 3rd part systems to SA...
entry.content:
Dear Hemanth,

You can use the External Events to trigger transactional emails like Quotation creation and use the Events API to create automation programs and also the attributes within that event can be used to make decisions within the automation program and also to personalize the content as required.

Events:: External events – Emarsys

Hope this helps.

Regards,
Saravanakumar M

entry.title: Re: how to transport an ambient ui5 application
entry.content:
Hi there,

Deploying to DEV and then transporting it to your environment is normally the way to go. Technically it is possible to deploy to QAS, but you will get mismatches in objects. I strongly recommend you use the default transport way.

Could you give some more details about your application? Does it use shared resources, do you have your namespace and references set properly in your manifest? Do you have a reference to sapui5 lib? It could be that your QAS system is not exactly the same as your DEV environment, as an example check if all services are running properly (SICF on gateway).

From your screenshot I can see you are using a standalone SAPUI5 app, so your reference in your index.html file could be wrong (to sapui5 lib). If this is correct, check out the SICF services if they are up and running.

Bear in mind that SSL certificate is also not valid (https). Also in your url you are using a client, is this client available on QAS? For a more user friendly way of presenting a technical url (port, client and so on), please let your team have a look at the web dispatcher too.

Kind regards,

Noël

entry.title: ERROR could not build the "sapcapirebook" module
entry.content:
Hi,

In the Business Application Studio, I am trying to build a CAP simple-bookshop application.
after I run 'npm run mta-build', I get the error message:

 

 

[2024-06-26 03:31:24]  INFO executing the "npm run build:cf" command...

> book@0.0.1 build:cf
> ui5 build preload --clean-dest --config ui5-deploy.yaml --include-task=generateCachebusterInfo

sh: 1: ui5: not found
[2024-06-26 03:31:24] ERROR could not build the "sapcapirebook" module: could not execute the "npm run build:cf" command: exit status 127
make: *** [Makefile_20240626033043.mta:37: sapcapirebook] Error 1
Error: could not build the MTA project: could not execute the "make -f Makefile_20240626033043.mta p=cf mtar= strict=true mode= t=\"./\"" command: exit status 2

 

 

My scripts in package.json:

 

 

  "scripts": {
    "start": "cds run",
    "deploy": "cds deploy -2 sqlite --no-save",
    "watch": "cds watch",
    "build": "cds build",
    "mta-build": "mbt build -t ./",
    "mta-deploy": "cf deploy simple-bookshop-oidc_1.1.5.mtar --delete-services",
    "undeploy": "cf undeploy simple-bookshop-oidc --delete-services --delete-service-keys",
    "mta-deploy:force": "cf deploy simple-bookshop-oidc_1.1.5.mtar --version-rule ALL",
    "build:cf": "ui5 build preload --clean-dest --config ui5-deploy.yaml --include-task=generateCachebusterInfo"
  },

 

 

repo:
https://github.tools.sap/I560824/simple-bookshop.git
branch:
change-history-1.8.0-milestone

Can any one advice, what am i doing wrong here and how to fix this?
By the way, some time ago, I was able to build normally, but this error occurred a few days ago.

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Wenjun

entry.title: Re: Packaging items from a production order without packi...
entry.content:
Hi,

yes, it is also possible to pack maually in transaction COP2 as described in the official documentation. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/2c2fa7ea82c54f0f9795cfc8c13daff6.html

You can delete the packing proposal and pack manually (enter any proper packaging material, etc. ).

Best regards,

Barış Yalçın

entry.title: contract test for (node js library without any endpoint)
entry.content:
We have a node js library which do not have any endpoint or apis. Various node microservices consume this library and use these functions to send or export logs/span/metrics data. We want to write contract test for our library.

How can we do this?

Is it possible to write test to validate the functions remain unchanged w.r.t functionName, arguments, returnType, modifiers.

entry.title: Re: How to implement Value-Help in Input-Field for RAP OData Fiori/UI5 App?
entry.content: There is a FE template 'Form Entry Object Page' that you can choose to create object page only, in there it only contains Form. It will use Smart controls for V2 and Macros contorls for V4. Or you can directly use Macros controls, please check https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/buildingBlocks/field/fieldEdit . Notes, the OData service can be the same which serve both for 'List Report Object Page' and 'Form entry object page' only make sure you have dedicated CDS annotations.

entry.title: Re: How can we assign MIC in breakdown maintenance order
entry.content:
For inspecting the equipment, I would suggest having inspection measuring points that I can refer to in the work order to create measurement documents for inspections, such as done/not done, ok/not ok or specific numerical readings.

I haven't experimented with pulling a task list with MICs in the breakdown order, but you can try.

Given the fact that inspections with MICs follow a specific process and have the specific purpose of calibrations, I would recommend the first approach of recording the measurement documents. SAP allows you to assign ad-hoc measuring points in the work orders from the list of measuring points against the technical asset. Moreover, you can also record ad-hoc measurement documents (no need to assign measuring points first) during order confirmations.

This will keep things efficient and effective.

Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: Embedding the SAP Analytics Cloud with Silent iFrame Navigation
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, we are currently working on the integration of our SAC Stories in different application to give our colleagues a flexible view on the data. In one of our application we have the requirement to show multiple Stories and the user can scroll from one to another Story. The current solution is currently that we have an iFrame to show the Story. When the user click on next, then page is reloaded and for the new iFrame the next URL points to the next Story. (So we don't reuse the iFrame.)

However, this is a source of frustration for our colleagues, as the page always takes 15 to 20 seconds to load the story.

We are therefore currently looking for an alternative integration and came across this topic in the help section: "Enable Silent iFrame Navigation"
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/a4406994704e4af5a8559a640b496468/9e147121f2254300b308c21b968a77f2.html?locale=en-US#enable-silent-iframe-navigation 

With this approach, we would reuse the iFrame. Unfortunately, our test implementation does not work. Do you have any idea why this might be?

We use a button with a JavaScript function to send the msg (postMessage) to the iFrame of the SAC. We see no error in the JavaScript console, but the iFrame don't change to the next Story URL.

function next(){
  var oIframe = document.getElementById("iframe");
  var requestId = (new Date()).getMilliseconds();
  if(iIndex + 1 < aStories.length){
    iIndex = iIndex + 1;
  } else {
    iIndex = 0;
  }
  var msg = {
    type: "request",
    service: "embed:silentNavigation",
    request_id: requestId,
    body: {
      path: aStories[iIndex]
    }
  };
  oIframe.contentWindow.postMessage(msg);
}

Thanks & best regards Denis

entry.title: Issue with adding filter and sort options for virtual elements in CDS SAP
entry.content:
Hello All,

There is a CDS view with virtually calculated elements with annotation @ObjectModel.virtualElementCalculatedBy: 'ABAP: CLASS NAME'. 

I wanted to add add filter and sort options for the same using below annotation,

@ObjectModel.filter.transformedBy: 'ABAP: CLASS NAME'

@ObjectModel.sort.transformedBy:'ABAP: CLASS NAME'

Created SE24 class for the same and implemented below Interfaces,

IF_SADL_EXIT_FILTER_TRANSFORM

IF_SADL_EXIT_SORT_TRANSFORM

For filter option implemented IF_SADL_EXIT_FILTER_TRANSFORM~MAP_ATOM method and below is the code added,

For Sort option implemented IF_SADL_EXIT_SORT_TRANSFORM~MAP_ELEMENT method and added below code,

Even after doing adding the code filter and sort options are not working even though these options are visible in application.

Kindly suggest to resolve this issue.

Thanks,

Nitin Kevate

entry.title: Re: Inquiry about SSL certificates
entry.content:
Hello,

 

The self-signed certificate with CN=SSL_Self_Signed_Fallback and SHA-1 hash algorithm has not been used by B1 as far as I know. 

it seems it's generated by older MS SQL server. 

please consider upgrading to MS SQL server 2017 which uses SHA256 algorithm.

 

reference: https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/t5/sql-server-support-blog/changes-to-hashing-algorithm-for-self-signed-certificate-in-sql/ba-p/319026

entry.title: Re: SOLMAN - Need to hide New Button in Normal and Urgent...
entry.content:
Hi Raghav,

Just checking if you have already seen and tried the steps from this previously answered question Solved: How to hide the button "New" in Urgent Change Sear... - SAP Community?

Regards, Kishan

entry.title: Zipping multiple files from SFTP to SFTP in one folder
entry.content:
Hi

I've a scenario where I want to pick multiple .txt files from a source SFTP and zip it in SAP CPI and place it in target SFTP folder. 

The names of the files should not be changed, and all the files have to be zipped in one folder and placed in target SFTP.

 

This is my flow.

Reading file name : The camel expression is ${header.CamelFileName}

Gather Step:

 

So far, when I process the data only one file is getting zipped, for example if I have 4 files in the folder I want all four to be zipped in one folder, but only one is getting zipped. 

Please help me with the solution.

Thanks and Regards.

Shreyas

entry.title: Re: 单据实际打印内容被截断
entry.content: 我也有一样的问题，打印预览和打印成PDF都是正常，直接到打印机打印就被截断了部分

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: A warm Hello from Germany! I am glad to join the SAP Community!

entry.title: SAP GROUP REPORTING ADDITIONAL DIMENSION MASTER DATA
entry.content:
Hi All! 

Our project is migrating from SAP BPC Consolidation to S4 Group Reporting, one of the Dimension in BPC in the Consolidation model is SEGMENT which is a a combination CC+PC.

1. Is there away we can add a Dimension in SAP Group Reporting to transform the combination of CC  + PC in S4?

2. Another requirement is if PC in S4 is Blank, how I can populate this field in SAP Group reporting to be NO_PC?

Regards,

Mark Escano

entry.title: Setting up the COPAA Archieve Object
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We've been looking into how we can set up the COPAA_XXXX or COPA1_XXXX archieve objects but havnt much success doing so, and I've been unable to find out how SAP suggest we do it.

 

The closest was this article: Archiving CO-PA Transaction Data | SAP Help Portal, and the method of going to the profititablity analysis Tools > Utilities > Prepare Archiving, did not create any object in IRM_CUST, for us to further setup.

Any advice or article can you can share?

entry.title: CBC - 2403、2406更新亮点
entry.content:
Overview

本博文介绍CBC2403、2406版本在前台应用中的更新亮点

功能介绍

1.您现在可以下载已选择的业务场景清单，选择Define Scope，点击My Selected Scope

点击Download Selected Scope来下载

打开下载文件PDF查看选择的业务场景

2.配置界面增强，可以扩展全部配置路径

增强了搜索用户体验，相关搜索配置路径自动打开

3.新增了对项目的设定界面，您可以在这里使用Initial Change, Switch Project

4. 您可以下载配置路径清单

5. 更新了Assign Deployment Target界面，优化了按钮Remove Assignment和信息Solution。

往期Blogs:CBC - 2205FD5、FD6更新亮点 - SAP Community

 

感谢观看

entry.title: Re: Customize OOTB files using buildcallbacks in CCV2
entry.content:
Hi @former_member634058 

I have followed same approach, but how can i give dev path in "buildcallbacks.xml" file.

This is my config

Local Config

<copy file="${ext.tncb2ccore.path}/resources/customize/extensioninfo-saprevenuecloudcustomer.xml" tofile="${HYBRIS_BIN_DIR}/modules/sap-subscription-billing/saprevenuecloudcustomer/extensioninfo.xml"/>

Supposed to be in Dev

<copy file="${ext.tncb2ccore.path}/src/de/hybris/tnc/b2c/core/customize/TmaXssStringDeserializer.java" tofile="/opt/workspace/build/extension-packs/hybris-b2ctelco-suite/hybris/bin/modules/b2c-telco-accelerator/b2ctelcotmfwebservices/web/src/de/hybris/platform/b2ctelcotmfwebservices/deserializers/TmaXssStringDeserializer.java"/>

entry.content:

entry.title: Alert notification in SAP S4/HANA public cloud and SAP BTP
entry.content:
Dear community,

I have access to SAP S4/HANA public cloud and SAP BTP, and hope I can find a solution to my problems in one of these platforms.

I have just added safety stock in masterdata, and would like to create notifications for each material when it reaches the safety stock level threshold. I would also like to add seperate notifications for when, based on future orders, it looks like the safety stock will be eaten into in x days. 

I would preferably like to create a webhook from the notification, so I have explored "SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP", but I feel I don't have enough insight to say if this is a good solution? I am open to other solutions, and it would be nice if I was able to see when the problem occured, what the problem is, where I can fix it etc. in the alert.

I have also explored Situation Handling, both the standard and extended framework, but the same feeling of not enough insight occurs. Both SAP BTP and Situation Handling seem interesting, but I do not know where to start.

I would love some help in trying to figure this out, and I am open to other suggestions, and hope someone has some great experiences with managing alerts and notifications regarding stock levels.

entry.title: Re: PCo Web Server dynamic Destination System Tags
entry.content:
Hi Scott,

maybe that is no more relevant for you, maybe you are not working with SAP PCo anymore, ...

However, I finally found something in the documentation on dynamic tag writing/reading with the query destination systems: Creating a Query Destination System with Parameterizable Tag Names | SAP Help Portal

It should be indeed possible to write tags based on dynamic input from a web server. Let me know if you have follow-up questions on the concrete configuration on SAP PCo.

BG

Constantin

entry.title: Can we restric the WBS for Sales order creation only ?
entry.content: My client want a particular WBS to be use for creating sales order only.It should be used for creating PO WO etc.If any one used the the particular WBS for creating other then Sales order then system should give POP "that this WBS can only be use for sales order creation only"

entry.title: Re: Using Outbound Service of another Software Component in BTP
entry.content:
Hi Sebastian,

please refer to https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/software-components?version=Cloud:
  • Objects of one software component cannot be used in another software component by default because software components provide their functionality via explicitly released APIs to other software components. This means you must set the API state of the object to Released (Release Contract C1) if you want to use an object from another software component. See Released APIs, Finding Released APIs andd Deprecated Objects.

In the planned release 2405, software component relations will be introduced which can be used to "release" objects on software-component level instead of object level, please refer to https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cross-product/roadmap-info/built-in-qualities?profile=20034788#business-configuration-and-extensibility

Best regards,
Peter

is this function still coming? 

are there alternatives?

 

#CALM #CloudALM

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello @JensArendt and welcome to SAP Community. Where in Germany are you from? I am asking because I would like to recommend to subscribe to a location group which is close to where you live. This is a great opportunity to connect with other peers. There are oftentimes events happening as well. Please check the Europe ones (including Germany) out here: https://community.sap.com/t5/europe/ct-p/europe

Also, the events might be scheduled in these calendars - you can subscribe by clicking the three-dot-menu "options" and select "subscribe":

SAP Stammtisch: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-stammtisch/eb-p/stammtisch
SAP Inside Track: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-inside-track/eb-p/insidetrack

entry.title: How to Move AUD$ and FGA_LOG$ tables to SYSAUX tablespace
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Good Day!
May we request for your recommendation and advise, on how to move below tables to SYSAUX tablespace, and if do we really need them to move to SYSAUX?
- AUD$
- FGA_LOG$

This is due to assessment performed on our Oracle databases, and as to use Automatic Space Segment Management, they recommended to move above tables to SYSAUX.
Currently SEGMEN of below tables are set to manual

===

SQL> select t.table_name,ts.segment_space_management from dba_tables t, dba_tablespaces ts where ts.tablespace_name = t.tablespace_name and t.table_name in ('AUD$','FGA_LOG$');

TABLE_NAME                     SEGMEN
------------------------------ ------
FGA_LOG$                       MANUAL
AUD$                           MANUAL

===

With this, may we ask for your recommendation re this one, on how to move such.
And also, since we are running SAP on Oracle databases, do we need to perform such? Do we have best practices for this one?


Hope to hear from you soon. If there will be questions, needed information,  or clarifications kindly let us know.


Thanks and Regards, 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Move AUD$ and FGA_LOG$ tables to SYSAUX tables...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

These tables are related to Unified Auditing. The audit schema belongs to SYSAUX tablespace, that could be the reason for this recommendation.

2379567 - Using Unified Auditing with SAP NetWeaver 

You can move the tables with brspace reorganization:

646681 - Reorganization of tables with BRSPACE

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere – Delta Extraction
entry.content:
@Kuma Thanks for your opinion. I am not sure what you mean by "using SQL". More precisely, I am not aware how to use plain SQL code inside Data Flow. Eventually, I need to get something like 'CRDAT between IntervalStart and IntervalEnd' executed in my source system. But I am not aware that I can do the same in a Data Flow.  
So I created an SQL view joining my remote table and the table with limiting paramter IntervalStart and IntervalEnd and used this SQL view as data source of my Data Flow. The result looked like full table scan in source system. 
BUT... Maybe there is an alternative solution. We can persist views based on partitions. Maybe that's the way to go. For me it was a POC. So I am afraid I cannot put more time into it but I still would like to understand this better

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hello @sveabecker thank you for that fast comment. I am from Heidelber. Let me check out the groups you mentioned. Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: ITSM in CALM
entry.content: Hi Tim, it has been some time since your last reply, do you know whether is there any functionality in the sense of incident/ticket management? Thank you a lot!

entry.title: Re: SAC Content Transport (Migration) Using CTMS
entry.content:
Dear Sujit,

Thanks a lot for your blog post and your feedback, which will help to further improve the process!

Concerning the initial setup of SAP Cloud Transport Management service, I wanted to mention that this does run as cloud service on SAP BTP. More information about how to set it up is available here: Set Up the Environment to Transport Content Archives directly in an Application | SAP Help Portal

Although the integration in this first version is pretty basic, I would in addition like to stress one advantage of the integration into SAP Cloud Transport Management: with this, you can centrally handle also changes from SAP Analytics Cloud in change and deployment management capabilities, such as being offered by SAP Cloud ALM or SAP Solution Manager (Change Request Management  - ChaRM, Quality Gate Management - QGM). If you should have overarching scenarios, spanning changes from different environments and services (such as changes from SAP BTP, from SAP Analytics Cloud, from an ABAP backend system running on-premise or in private cloud, ...), you can synchronize their delivery from a central place. For example, the integration of SAP Cloud Transport Management service into SAP Cloud ALM is pretty simple (just by setting up a destination on SAP Cloud ALM following a certain naming convention), as described here: New Integration of SAP Cloud Transport Management ... - SAP Community

Still, your feedback absolutely valid, of course - so, thanks a lot again and keep up the great work here in the SAP Community,
Boris

entry.title: SAC Hyperlink Filter Inheritance Between Two Stories Using Different Models
entry.content:
The goal: Allow a user to browse and filter an Overview story which is using its own model.
Once the user has filtered for relevant information in Overview story, user will use table hyperlink to direct to a detailed Ledger story containing more in-depth information and is using a secondary model. This Ledger story will inherit the filters from Overview story.

Example: User filters Overview to only show data from 2023 and WBS elements equal to "T"
Using hyperlink the user navigates to Ledger which is inheriting filters and is now filtered to only show 2023 data and WBS elements equal to "T".

Trouble: It does not seem possible to create this. In my first attempt I had two stories where the dimension names and dimension technical names were not equal and the inherited filters from Overview story, while being present, had no effect on Ledger story.
Second attempt I found two models which shared the same dimension name and the same dimension technical name. I used these two models to test. The inherited filters from Overview story, while being present, still had no effect on Ledger story.
The following was my Hyperlink settings.

Any suggestions as to how I could reach the goal behavior?
Is it not possible to inherit filters between two different models, even if the name and technical name are the exact same?

entry.title: Re: SAP Group Reporting - Different Consolidation Methods...
entry.content: Hi JayMark, also group ownership percentages can be maintained depending on the consolidation group. This in itself does not require an additional version in my eyes.

entry.title: Re: Split Batch Validation on VL31N/VL32N
entry.content:
As you can see there is no user-exit or any other enhancment around VL287 message. It is always issued as an information message. 

You can either change the SAP standard code and make the message an error one (be aware of possible side effects and test throughly) or use one of the enhancement I've mentioned previousely to implement your own validation.

entry.title: Re: How can we assign MIC in breakdown maintenance order
entry.content:
Hello Dhan, Ideally equipment's are inspected through Calibration methods as per predefined call horizon mentioned maintenance plan. If you still wants to inspect equipment through breakdown maintenance order, you can have validation process mentioned in notification and by having quality inspector task in place. So that it will not allowing closing of breakdown maintenance order until quality tasks is completed. 

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hello @papos852 ,

If you are looking for a professional certification in SAP SuccessFactors, you will not find it on My Learning -> Certifications. As those Professional levels are not based on an exam but require project experience, they have not been in the scope of the first wave to migrate. Nevertheless, we are working on a solution to migrate those professional-level certifications as well.

Kind Regards, Suzanne

Hi Barış,

thanks for your reply. So far I haven't been able to pack manually. I can enter a proper packaging material, but I can't connect (pack) the main material with the packaging material.

It could work with packaging instructions, but that wouldn't meet the requirement.

entry.title: Optimal Value for session_cached_cursors parameter in EP2
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Good Day!
May we request for your recommendation and advise, do we really need to adjust the session_cached_cursors parameter in EP2 database, and if yes, by how much?

This is due to assessment performed on our Oracle databases, and as appeared on our ORAChk reports, we needed to increase the said parameter.
But the question on our side is if we needed to update such, by how much? Currently session_cached_cursors parameter in EP2 is set to 50
===

NAME                                 TYPE        VALUE
------------------------------------ ----------- ------------------------------
session_cached_cursors               integer     50

PARAMETER              VALUE           USAGE
---------------------- --------------- ----------
session_cached_cursors    50           ####%
open_cursors            DIGITS             15%

===

With this, may we ask for your recommendation re this one, on what value do we need to adjust session_cached_cursors parameter. This is to avoid multiple DB restarts due to trial and error.
And also, since we are running SAP on Oracle databases, do we need to perform such? Do we have best practices for this one?


Hope to hear from you soon. If there will be questions, needed information,  or clarifications kindly let us know.


Thanks and Regards, 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Optimal Value for session_cached_cursors parameter in...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

As described in below note, since each SQL statement is opened only once and the cursor is kept open in the standard system, you do not need to cache cursors at session level for a repeated parsing. There is no point, therefore, in setting SESSION_CACHED_CURSORS to a value greater than 0.

912389 - Cursor parameters on Oracle 

This parameter is not mentioned in our official parameter recommendation note either, so increasing the parameter is not recommended by SAP.

2470718 - Oracle Database Parameter 12.2 / 18c / 19c 

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Error in Build process automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are creating a Build process in Build process automation and as a part of that I have created a process and within this main process I have created some automations. Now when i am trying to release these automations along with the process, I am getting these errors. 

Has anyone already faced this. I tried to check where the status of these artifacts are maintained, but could not find it so far. Any help would be really appreciated. Thanks.

entry.content:
I dont believe that this is the issue but lets try, this is the SAP. 

Like you can see before all changes in the first run of proposal SAP aggregate document correctly. 
It looks like SAP don't repeat aggregation on edit mode.

entry.title: Re: Using Outbound Service of another Software Component in BTP
entry.content: Hi Peter! Thanks for your answer. I'm aware of the contract logic. Unfortunately, outbound services don't have API Contracts or I haven't found them. Does this mean, it's not possible to reuse Objects of the communication management and must recreate them for every App/Service?

entry.title: Re: Creating a personal development environment #1 - Why Neovim?
entry.content: I can totally relate! I used to work with VS Code, but found myself relying heavily on my mouse, which didn't quite fit my preference for keyboard-centric workflows. While VS Code is undeniably a great IDE, I found Neovim to be a game changer for someone like me who prefers doing everything with the keyboard. It definitely enhances speed and efficiency as you get more experienced with it. As a fresher who has just started using Neovim, I'm already seeing the benefits. Happy coding!

entry.title: SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge learning journey
entry.content:
It is well-known that if you want to move from on-premise to cloud in data warehousing, you must cross a bridge called SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge.  

In particular, if you want to migrate from SAP BW on any DB, SAP BW on HANA or SAP BW/4HANA to SAP Datasphere, you need to use SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge. One of the main benefits is that data in your data storage is not lost but can be transferred directly to the cloud. The SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge simplifies the migration process by providing connectivity, data transformation, and real-time processing capabilities.   

If you are at the beginning or already in the middle of such a migration and want to get familiar with its main functionality in data modeling and data integration, join our new free of charge learning journey “Modeling in SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge”.  

Furthermore, if you are interested in learning about the strategic development and the roadmap of SAP Datasphere and SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge and discover its functionality in expert-guided hands-on sessions, join our annual Analytics Forum 2024 in Walldorf. Read more and register.   

Your SAP Learning Analytics Team

entry.title: Up to 5 Decimal Places for quantities in general journal
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am looking for a way to increase the decimal places to 5 (digits after the comma) when entering a general journal entry.

In CBC there is this configuration activity 'Checks Units of Measurement' where you have the possibility to create your own unit of measure (changing an existing one doesn't seem possible). 

I created an additional Unit of Measure with following settings:

However, if I want to use this in the general journal entry app, I can only add up to 3 decimal places, but it shows 5 decimal places:

Can anyone help me on how to be able to enter 5 decimal places for quantity in a general journal entry?

Thank you!

entry.title: CamelJdbcAdapter OAuth Configuration for Databricks
entry.content:
We want to get rid of the usage of PATs for the connection between DP Agent and Databricks. We have to connect via OAuth 2.0.

We are using the setup as described here:
Connecting to Databricks with the Camel JDBC Adapter | SAP Help Portal 

with Token and PAT. Since last year, the Databricks JDBC Driver is able to connect via OAuth 2.0 M2M to databricks:
Databricks JDBC Driver Installation and Configuration Guide (microsoft.com) 

How do we have to modify the configurations of the adapter and the remote source to be able to use OAuth 2.0?

We have selected the Substitution Item Type as " Allow Inline Substitution and Subitem Generation "

entry.title: Re: Failed to connect to Northwind Odata v4 via Webi Rich...
entry.content: So try testing it with the Rich client in “Standalone” mode.

entry.title: Re: How to implement a custom entity in the ABAP RESTful Programming Model using remote function mod
entry.content:
Hello, Andre_Fischer!
Thank you for you course regarding SAP and keep doing what you doing (from our whole team 🙂
We encountered an issue when transferring our logic from web to HANA:

Spoiler

 

Spoiler

define root view entity C_CDX_ROOT_ACTIVITY

as select from activity as Activity

composition [0..*] of I_CDX_ACT_PARTNER as _Partner

association [0..1] to I_CDX_TVAL_ACTTYPE as _ActivityTypeText on $projection./it305/akttyp = _ActivityTypeText.ActivityType

...

 



And we have a custom entity - reading long texts by class:

@EndUserText.label: 'Long Texts for Activity'

@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy:'ABAP: I_SFX_ACT_LONG_TXT_EXT'

define custom entity I_SFX_ACT_LONG_TEXT

{

key vbeln : vbeln;

external_text : abap.char(500);

}
When we try to link this like that:
association [0..1] to I_SFX_ACT_LONG_TEXT as _ActivityLongText on $projection.vbeln = _ActivityLongText.vbeln
It's ok.
But in case:
_ActivityLongText.external_text, - we have a problem with:
Association "_ActivityLongText" of entity "/IT305/I_SFX_ACT_LONG_TEXT" cannot be used

Question is: how to link this two entities (because association doesn't work and we don't have any solutions)
Other links don't give us an answer or way how to resolve it.
You are our last hope 🙂

Thanks and best regards from our whole team.
